title: Disney 30 Baby Step Cards
features: Each card has a different design featuring your favourite Disney characters.
Each card has a phrase or phrase for another event.
description: Pack of 30 step cards featuring illustrations of your favourite Disney characters. Ideal for capturing special moments and events during the first weeks and months of your baby's life. Ideal for newborns and as a baby shower gift. Each card has a phrase for a different event, including: Today I am 8 months old. Today is my first birthday. Today I crawled for the first time Today I slept through the night for the first time. Card size: 11 x 15 cm.
